subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Desire of the world and the Lord of all nations, Who hath caused the hidden and treasured mysteries to be revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم و مولی الامم را لایق و سزاست که اسرار مکنونه مخزونه را محض
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for the departed
